name: guard-skills

name: axocoatl
description: Agentic runtime in Rust — persistent, supervised agents. Self-hosted, local-first, zero telemetry. Apache 2.0.

description: Open-source AI-powered website audit CLI using the OpenAI API for SEO, UX, accessibility, performance, trust, and content analysis.

name: Council
description: Ask several AI models one question — they answer in parallel, critique each other blind, and you decide. Native macOS, bring-your-own-keys.

name: MCPify
description: MCPify is an AI enablement compiler that transforms existing applications into AI-native, agent-operable systems.

name: lrnev-govern

name: engineering-os
description: Your AI finally remembers your codebase

name: agentgraphed
description: Local-first analytics dashboard for AI coding sessions. See what you built with Claude Code & Codex CLI.

name: arxiv-reader-mcp
description: Want to search arXiv papers, fetch metadata, and extract full-text PDFs without leaving your editor? This MCP server connects any MCP-compatible client (Claude Code, etc.) directly to arXiv.
